channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: RQ-P1 Partlow Revolutionary Line
item.description: RQ-P1 Partlow Revolutionary Line This page tracks the proof chain from Marion Elizabeth Partlow back to Benjamin Partlow, the Revolutionary War pensioner in Culpeper County, Virginia.

item.title: Clark County Illinois Partlow Rude Marriage Request
item.description: Clark County Illinois Partlow Rude Marriage Request Purpose Request the historical marriage record for the reported 10 Jun 1900 marriage of Frank / Nollie Franklin Partlow and Alice / Mary Alice Rude in Clark County, Illinois.

item.title: Harry C Partlow 1960 Letter and Handwritten Lineage
item.description: Harry C Partlow 1960 Letter and Handwritten Lineage This reference summarizes a three-page scanned PDF found at /mnt/c/Users/zach/Dropbox (Old)/Tom/Tom/partlow_family.pdf.

item.title: New England Ball Project Partlow Census Citation Extract
item.description: New England Ball Project Partlow Census Citation Extract Purpose Extract the exact census citation trail from the New England Ball Project pages for John Halleck Partlow, Lydia Bennett, and Marion McDonald Partlow.

item.title: RQ-M1 John Murray Deed Findings
item.description: RQ-M1 John Murray Deed Findings This page is the findings log for the 1826 and 1833 John Murray deed leads in Lewis County, Virginia / West Virginia.

item.title: Visual Story Atlas
item.description: Diagram-first guide to the Copley family story, evidence status, settlement network, and active research quests.

item.title: Dolan Family
item.description: Dolan Family The Dolan family is part of the Lewis County Catholic settlement network and the maternal line for John Copley’s children through Mary Ellen Dolan Copley.

item.title: Gideon D. Camden
item.description: Gideon D. Camden Stub person profile created to prevent broken links. Known Information Name: Gideon D.

item.title: Minter Bailey
item.description: Minter Bailey Stub person profile created to prevent broken links.

item.title: Octavius Pickering
item.description: Octavius Pickering Stub person profile created to prevent broken links.
